currentFocus: Parallel rebuild/lore/WinUI integration: accepted PatchBench receipt behavior tests/scaffold, TMM ARM4 readiness proof-plan checker, Lore pack metadata hardening, and Save Lab route persistence are staged; next work is PatchBench extraction readiness hardening before any live page wiring.

integratedWave.summary: The integrated wave adds bounded code/test/docs/tooling improvements and folds read-only storage/runtime/process findings into canonical state without promoting runtime, release, online, rebuild, storage-delete, or payload claims.
acceptedOutputs: Pre-extraction PatchBench receipt layout/redaction/Host-Join behavior tests plus an unwired primitive formatter scaffold.
Public-safe TMM ARM4 readiness-gate proof-plan slot and checker.
Lore builder/checker relativePath equality plus AppCore loaded-document path, duplicate id/path, hash-mismatch, stale-state, and generic pack-load error hardening.
WinUI shell route persistence fix for Save Lab persisted tab 0.
deferredOutputs: No live PatchBench page wiring to the new receipt scaffold.
No completed readiness-gate execution, runtime proof, rebuild parity, release work, storage deletion, or Host/Join enablement.
Lore ZIP package probe relativePath parity remains future work.
WinUI UX audit residual path-redaction, proof-jargon, first-run, and accessibility items remain future work.

patchBenchReceiptBoundary.status: pre-extraction behavior tests and unwired primitive scaffold integrated
patchBenchReceiptBoundary.scope: WinUI-local primitive receipt display contract plus static source guards; BinaryPatchesPage remains the live page formatter owner.
patchBenchReceiptBoundary.summary: PatchBench receipt tests cover layout, headline, label/value rows, section headings, bullet formatting, whitespace normalization, hostile display values, online-ready wording rejection, and existing Host/Join fallback append/no-duplicate behavior.
limits: No production page wiring to PatchBenchSafeCopyReceiptText.
No AppCore receipt construction or behavior change.
No File/Path/I/O, launch planning, process control, patch/catalog semantics, online behavior, runtime proof, or Host/Join enablement moved.
The scaffold is not runtime hostile-value rejection proof and not extraction readiness by itself.
futureExtractionGates: Host/Join partial, punctuation, and case-variant boundary tests.
Page-versus-helper parity tests with documented intentional deltas.
Mapper tests from AppCore receipt DTOs into WinUI-local primitive state before any helper wiring.

limits: No command arming, shell dispatch, importer execution, private asset read, generated payload, runtime proof, visual/gameplay proof, rebuild parity, runtime parity, or no-noticeable-difference parity.

lorePackBoundary.summary: Lore pack builder/checker rejects unsafe relativePath values and index/content mismatches. AppCore loader rejects unsafe loaded document paths, duplicate ids, duplicate case-insensitive paths, hash mismatch, and stale pack retention after invalid loads.
lorePackBoundary.errorDisplayBoundary: Current AppCore content-pack load InvalidDataException messages are generic for row-controlled relativePath/id/hash mismatch cases that can surface through LorePage status text.
limits: Not broad ZIP package probe parity.
Not a proven filesystem traversal vulnerability fix.
Not a broad WinUI exception-display redesign.
lorePackBoundary.nextHardening: Add ZIP package probe parity for the same lore-pack relativePath grammar, and decide whether AppCore should also enforce index/content relativePath equality rather than leaving that to builder/check tooling.

winuiRoutePersistence.summary: MainWindow restores LastTab=0 to the Save Lab route and tests the route round trip.
limits: No screenshot, UIA, accessibility compliance, release readiness, or runtime proof claim.

storageTaxonomy.futureReviewValues: Medium and low values are non-authorized logical review ceilings only; they are not reclaimable storage, unique physical-size estimates, candidate pools, cleanup targets, urgency signals, or deletion budgets.
futureDeletionRequires: private exact manifest row ids and digest
same-volume quarantine by default with rollback and restore proof

consultCompliance.status: integration consults complete; worker consult evidence accepted with caveats
consultCompliance.summary: Worker reports record required Codex and Cursor lanes for the accepted write/read-only work. Integration review used Codex normal, Codex adversarial, composer-2.5-fast normal/adversarial, and gemini-3.1-pro normal/adversarial lanes. Process evidence is report-attested and sanitized-bundle scanned, not raw prompt/output reconstruction.
acceptedIntegrationFindings: Narrowed Lore state wording so index/content relativePath mismatch enforcement is attributed to builder/check tooling, not AppCore loading.
Added a source-level default-route regression test proving AppConfig LastTab defaults to Home while persisted 0 restores Save Lab.
Kept PatchBench helper unwired and carried Host/Join parity, manifest policy, and sentinel hardening as future gates.
Kept TMM ARM4, storage, runtime, release, Host/Join, and online non-claims explicit.
deferredIntegrationFindings: Lore ZIP probe parity and optional AppCore index/content relativePath enforcement are future hardening tasks.
Receipt display filtering remains defense-in-depth until future page/helper parity and wiring tests exist.
TMM front-door full-file scan hardening is future checker polish, not a current integration blocker.
consultCompliance.safeWording: Use no recorded blocking dissent among completed lanes; do not treat unavailable, timed-out, tainted, or retried lanes as stronger evidence than recorded.

currentTruth.hardPayloadBoundary: No game assets, copied executables, arbitrary saves/options, screenshots/frame dumps, raw CDB logs, raw proof bundles, full Ghidra databases/backups, secrets, .env files, build output, package output, local proof paths, raw manifests, thread IDs, or local campaign/worktree paths belong in tracked state or docs.
currentTruth.installedGameOriginalBea: read-only; no mutation performed or authorized

nextSteps: PatchBench: add concatenation/interpolation sentinel, manifest filename policy, Host/Join variant, and page-versus-helper parity tests before any helper wiring.
Lore: add ZIP package probe relativePath parity and decide AppCore index/content equality enforcement.
RE/rebuild: keep tmm-arm4-readiness-gate as proof-plan/checker support only until separate readiness-gate authority exists.
WinUI UX: address one residual path-redaction, proof-jargon, first-run, or accessibility item at a time.
Storage: remain read-only until future deletion authority and candidate-specific evidence exist.
Runtime: remain private pre-arm/no-live unless a future task grants explicit runtime-proof authority and leases.
